title: CrafterLib
description: CrafterLib - A robust Custom Crafter library for Minecraft
body:
# CrafterLib 
### A robust Custom Crafter library for Minecraft

> 💡 Notice: A tool to generate recipes from a GUI is coming soon!

CrafterLib provides a custom crafting table that allows recipes with items that have components to be both input and output. It strives for simplicity and performance, whilst maintaining usability.

It currently only supports Shaped "Exactly Where Placed" recipes, though it has partial support for Shapeless (only works if a recipe does not require multiple of the same item).
